name: rf/series_parallel_rlc
description: Series RLC one-port: FDTD resonance peak vs analytic f0 = 1/(2pi sqrt(LC)).
notes: FDTD load-port current peak at 7.901 GHz (C=1pF) vs analytic 7.118 GHz, and 7.669 GHz at C=2pF. The C(1)->C(2) peak ratio is 1.030 vs the ideal sqrt(2)=1.414: the lumped two-port bench is parasitic-dominated and does NOT isolate the RLC resonance. Analytic f0 binds as the first-line reference; the wave-level RLC resonance from a propagating transmission structure is recorded as an open gap (see tests/rf/wave_validation/test_rlc_resonance_wave_level.py) rather than a parasitic peak that would pass by coincidence.
